changes.diff:
@@ -61,9 +61,11 @@
   defp gh_replacement(command) do
+    gh = ~S/(?:^|\s)(?:\S*\/)?gh\s+/
+
     cond do
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:create|edit)/, command) -> "bos_create_pull_request"
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:merge|close)/, command) -> "bos_request_merge"
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:checks|status)/, command) -> "bos_get_pull_request_checks"
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\b/, command) -> "bos_get_pull_request"
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+issue\b/, command) -> "bos_get_issue"
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+release\b/, command) -> "bos_create_release"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/pr\s+(?:create|edit)/), command) -> "bos_create_pull_request"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/pr\s+(?:merge|close)/), command) -> "bos_request_merge"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/pr\s+(?:checks|status)/), command) -> "bos_get_pull_request_checks"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/pr\b/), command) -> "bos_get_pull_request"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/issue\b/), command) -> "bos_get_issue"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/release\b/), command) -> "bos_create_release"
       true -> "the corresponding bos-mcp domain operation"

defmodule SymphonyElixir.Codex.CommandPolicyTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  alias SymphonyElixir.Codex.CommandPolicy

  test "blocks GitHub CLI through names, absolute paths, quoting, and shell wrappers" do
    commands = [
      "gh pr list",
      "/usr/local/bin/gh issue view 11",
      ~s('/opt/tools/gh' pr checks 7),
      ~s(bash -lc "gh pr create --title test"),
      ~s(env FOO=bar sh -c '/usr/bin/gh release list')
    ]

    for command <- commands do
      assert {:deny, denial} = CommandPolicy.evaluate(command)
      assert denial.reason =~ "GitHub CLI"
      assert denial.suggested_operation =~ "bos_"
    end
  end

  test "blocks detectable direct GitHub REST and GraphQL requests" do
    commands = [
      "curl https://api.github.com/repos/acme/widget/pulls",
      ~s(wget "https://api.github.com/graphql"),
      ~s(python -c "requests.get('https://api.github'.com/issues')"),
      ["node", "script.js", "https://api.github.com/graphql"]
    ]

    for command <- commands do
      assert {:deny, denial} = CommandPolicy.evaluate(command)
      assert denial.reason =~ "REST or GraphQL"
      assert denial.suggested_operation =~ "bos_"
    end
  end

  test "allows ordinary git transport including fetch and exact non-force push" do
    assert :allow = CommandPolicy.evaluate("git fetch origin main")
    assert :allow = CommandPolicy.evaluate("git push origin HEAD:refs/heads/bos/issue-11")
    assert :allow = CommandPolicy.evaluate("git clone git@github.com:acme/widget.git .")
  end
end

@@ -61,9 +61,11 @@
   defp gh_replacement(command) do
+    gh = ~S/(?:^|\s)(?:\S*\/)?gh\s+/
+
     cond do
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:create|edit)/, command) -> "bos_create_pull_request"
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:merge|close)/, command) -> "bos_request_merge"
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:checks|status)/, command) -> "bos_get_pull_request_checks"
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\b/, command) -> "bos_get_pull_request"
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+issue\b/, command) -> "bos_get_issue"
-      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+release\b/, command) -> "bos_create_release"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/pr\s+(?:create|edit)/), command) -> "bos_create_pull_request"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/pr\s+(?:merge|close)/), command) -> "bos_request_merge"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/pr\s+(?:checks|status)/), command) -> "bos_get_pull_request_checks"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/pr\b/), command) -> "bos_get_pull_request"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/issue\b/), command) -> "bos_get_issue"
+      Regex.match?(Regex.compile!(gh <> ~S/release\b/), command) -> "bos_create_release"
       true -> "the corresponding bos-mcp domain operation"

defmodule SymphonyElixir.Codex.CommandPolicyTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  alias SymphonyElixir.Codex.CommandPolicy

  test "blocks GitHub CLI through names, absolute paths, quoting, and shell wrappers" do
    commands = [
      "gh pr list",
      "/usr/local/bin/gh issue view 11",
      ~s('/opt/tools/gh' pr checks 7),
      ~s(bash -lc "gh pr create --title test"),
      ~s(env FOO=bar sh -c '/usr/bin/gh release list')
    ]

    for command <- commands do
      assert {:deny, denial} = CommandPolicy.evaluate(command)
      assert denial.reason =~ "GitHub CLI"
      assert denial.suggested_operation =~ "bos_"
    end
  end

  test "blocks detectable direct GitHub REST and GraphQL requests" do
    commands = [
      "curl https://api.github.com/repos/acme/widget/pulls",
      ~s(wget "https://api.github.com/graphql"),
      ~s(python -c "requests.get('https://api.github'.com/issues')"),
      ["node", "script.js", "https://api.github.com/graphql"]
    ]

    for command <- commands do
      assert {:deny, denial} = CommandPolicy.evaluate(command)
      assert denial.reason =~ "REST or GraphQL"
      assert denial.suggested_operation =~ "bos_"
    end
  end

  test "allows ordinary git transport including fetch and exact non-force push" do
    assert :allow = CommandPolicy.evaluate("git fetch origin main")
    assert :allow = CommandPolicy.evaluate("git push origin HEAD:refs/heads/bos/issue-11")
    assert :allow = CommandPolicy.evaluate("git clone git@github.com:acme/widget.git .")
  end
end

payload.outputSummary:
}
    }

    normalized = Outbox.normalize_codex_payload("item/completed", payload, "2026-07-20T10:00:00.000Z")

    assert normalized["commandId"] == "cmd_001"
    assert normalized["command"] == "mix test"
    assert normalized["workingDirectory"] == "$WORKSPACE"
    assert normalized["exitCode"] == 0
    assert normalized["durationMs"] == 245
    assert normalized["outputSummary"] == "260 tests, 0 failures"
    assert normalized["redacted"] == true
  end

  test "persists semantic lifecycle but drops high-frequency telemetry deltas" do
    command_item = %{"method" => "item/started", "params" => %{"item" => %{"type" => "commandExecution"}}}
    reasoning_item = %{"method" => "item/completed", "params" => %{"item" => %{"type" => "reasoning"}}}

    assert Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :item_started, payload: command_item})
    assert Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :turn_completed, payload: %{"method" => "turn/completed"}})
    refute Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :notification, payload: reasoning_item})
    refute Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :notification, payload: %{"method" => "item/agentMessage/delta"}})
    refute Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :notification, payload: %{"method" => "item/commandExecution/outputDelta"}})
    refute Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :notification, payload: %{"method" => "thread/tokenUsage/updated"}})
    refute Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :notification, payload: %{"method" => "account/rateLimits/updated"}})
  end

  test "quarantines legacy telemetry while preserving commands, tools and turn lifecycle" do
    root = Path.join(System.tmp_dir!(), "bos-outbox-compaction-test-#{System.unique_integer([:positive])}")
    events_path = Path.join([root, "run_legacy", "events"])
    File.mkdir_p!(events_path)

    issue = %{"repositoryId" => "bos-front", "issueNumber" => 42, "runId" => "run_legacy"}

    events = [
      %{
        "eventId" => "event_turn",
        "runId" => "run_legacy",
        "sequen

item.aggregatedOutput:
}
    }

    normalized = Outbox.normalize_codex_payload("item/completed", payload, "2026-07-20T10:00:00.000Z")

    assert normalized["commandId"] == "cmd_001"
    assert normalized["command"] == "mix test"
    assert normalized["workingDirectory"] == "$WORKSPACE"
    assert normalized["exitCode"] == 0
    assert normalized["durationMs"] == 245
    assert normalized["outputSummary"] == "260 tests, 0 failures"
    assert normalized["redacted"] == true
  end

  test "persists semantic lifecycle but drops high-frequency telemetry deltas" do
    command_item = %{"method" => "item/started", "params" => %{"item" => %{"type" => "commandExecution"}}}
    reasoning_item = %{"method" => "item/completed", "params" => %{"item" => %{"type" => "reasoning"}}}

    assert Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :item_started, payload: command_item})
    assert Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :turn_completed, payload: %{"method" => "turn/completed"}})
    refute Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :notification, payload: reasoning_item})
    refute Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :notification, payload: %{"method" => "item/agentMessage/delta"}})
    refute Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :notification, payload: %{"method" => "item/commandExecution/outputDelta"}})
    refute Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :notification, payload: %{"method" => "thread/tokenUsage/updated"}})
    refute Outbox.auditable_update?(%{event: :notification, payload: %{"method" => "account/rateLimits/updated"}})
  end

  test "quarantines legacy telemetry while preserving commands, tools and turn lifecycle" do
    root = Path.join(System.tmp_dir!(), "bos-outbox-compaction-test-#{System.unique_integer([:positive])}")
    events_path = Path.join([root, "run_legacy", "events"])
    File.mkdir_p!(events_path)

    issue = %{"repositoryId" => "bos-front", "issueNumber" => 42, "runId" => "run_legacy"}

    events = [
      %{
        "eventId" => "event_turn",
        "runId" => "run_legacy",
        "sequence" => 10,
        "eventHash" => "sha256:turn",
        "eventType" => "agent.progress_recorded",
        "payload" => %{"method" => "turn/started"}
      },
      %{
        "eventId" => "event_delta",
        "runId" => "run_legacy",
31:                         "command.policy_blocked",
535:      method == "bos/commandPolicy/blocked" ->
561:  defp event_type("bos/commandPolicy/blocked", _payload), do: "command.policy_blocked"
582:  defp event_status(%{event: :command_policy_blocked}), do: "blocked"

diff --git a/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/audit/outbox.ex b/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/audit/outbox.ex
index dead79b72eed9132bac66360d373f8fce0b8b478..da1a00b4ca8e6cc166dcb2218744a6aea152f586
--- a/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/audit/outbox.ex
+++ b/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/audit/outbox.ex
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@
                          "agent.turn_cancelled",
                          "command.started",
                          "command.completed",
+                         "command.policy_blocked",
                          "tool.requested",
                          "tool.confirmed"
                        ])
@@ -531,6 +532,9 @@
         |> codex_item()
         |> auditable_item?()
 
+      method == "bos/commandPolicy/blocked" ->
+        true
+
       true ->
         false
     end
@@ -554,6 +558,7 @@
   defp event_type("turn/completed", _payload), do: "agent.turn_completed"
   defp event_type("turn/failed", _payload), do: "agent.turn_failed"
   defp event_type("turn/cancelled", _payload), do: "agent.turn_cancelled"
+  defp event_type("bos/commandPolicy/blocked", _payload), do: "command.policy_blocked"
   defp event_type(_method, _payload), do: "agent.progress_recorded"
 
   defp item_event_type(payload, suffix) do
@@ -574,6 +579,7 @@
 
   defp event_status(%{event: :turn_failed}), do: "failed"
   defp event_status(%{event: :turn_cancelled}), do: "cancelled"
+  defp event_status(%{event: :command_policy_blocked}), do: "blocked"
   defp event_status(_update), do: "completed"
 
   defp summary(method, %{"command" => command} = payload)
